ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "emissions" REAL /* Value of the emissions reported */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code as per ISO 3166-1-Alpha-2 */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Short name of the pollutant */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the guideline for classification */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the emission data was reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emissions data */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the economy where the emissions occurred */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector within the sector */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for emissions */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data has been verified */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* Identifier of the person or entity that verified the data */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was verified */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Identifier of the person or entity that created the data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* Identifier of the person or entity that last modified the data */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_pollutant_name FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_name") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* International country code (ISO 3166-1-Alpha-2) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "emissions_target" REAL /* Target emissions reduction commitment */,
  "last_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the last emissions report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Short name of the pollutant being tracked */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pollutant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Common sources of the pollutant */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_name")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each emission record
